title: MrFEG's Coffee Box
description: This Mod Adds Coffee To The Game With  Functionalities Also. More Features Will be Added Soon!
body:
#                                      Welcome To!

![MrFEG's Coffee Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e13c8c4e0f9bbf1f811fc4b7dc5bff1ab509ba.png)
                                                  





                                                       





This Mod Adds Working Coffee To The Game.For Now It Is Small Mod....

My Goal Is To Add Varieties Of Coffee And Much More Functionalities To This Mod. So Please Support Me Guys To Make More Features To This MOD!



FEATURES :



--> Working ****Coffee Machine**** That Can Be Used TO Make Coffee Which You Can Drink OFCOURSE.
But The Coffee Gives You Potion Effects For Under 1 Minute Go Check it Out For YOURSELF!!!!

--> We Can Also Place Cups Down Like Actual Blocks Not Just an Item By Sneaking And Right Clicking This Is For Decoration Purposes!!

-->To Get ****Coffee Bean**** You Can Grow ****Coffee Plants**** By Trading ****Coffee Seeds**** From Villagers Like Farmer And Wandering Trader!



MORE FEATURES WILL BE ADDED SOON!!!!!!! PLEASE Stay Tuned!!!



                                                                                           THANKYOU!

****CHECK OUT MY MOD ON YOUTUBE!****
